title: Recursive Data Merging with Edge Cases
scenario: Write a prompt that merges two datasets, one containing customer information and another containing order history, where each customer has a unique ID, name, and email, and each order has a unique ID, customer ID, and order date. The datasets contain the following information: 'Customer ID: 123, Name: John Doe, Email: johndoe@example.com. Order ID: 1, Customer ID: 123, Order Date: 2022-01-01.' 'Customer ID: 456, Name: Jane Doe, Email: janedoe@example.com. Order ID: 2, Customer ID: 456, Order Date: 2022-01-15.' The prompt should generate a merged dataset containing customer information and order history, handling edge cases where customers have no orders or orders have no customer information.
constraints: Must use recursion to merge the datasets
Must handle edge cases where customers have no orders or orders have no customer information
Must generate a merged dataset containing customer information and order history

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated prompt uses recursion to merge the datasets and handles edge cases.
Verify that the generated merged dataset accurately represents the customer information and order history.
Check if the generated prompt is syntactically valid and can be executed without errors.
